# Contributing

This public repository is a generated install surface. The canonical development
tree is `mootx01-ee`.

Please open issues here for public library bugs, documentation gaps, and package
manager problems. Pull requests are welcome as patch intake, but maintainers may
port accepted changes back into the canonical tree before the next generated
publish run.

Generated release files should not be edited by hand.
